listitem.para: Explain the naming format for Vietnamese men and women.
When does a traditional Vietnamese have a birthday? What might this mean for child development in accordance with the US standards and expectations?
What are traditional Vietnamese family roles and decision-making?
Describe two high-risk health behaviors that may require additional screening during a health care intervention.
List five ideologies or ideals that Vietnamese people value as part of the culture.
Explain the am and duong concepts of nutrition.
How do am and duong practices vary with pregnancy and postpartum practices?
How are the principles of am and duong displayed in illnesses?
How are mental illnesses seen among the Vietnamese? As a health-care provider, what can you do to improve Vietnamese’s’ access to mental health professionals?
Explain the five different traditional Vietnamese medical practices.
